description: Raise min_confluence_score from 2 to 3. confluence_score has 0.6643 mean |SHAP| â€” 3rd most important predictor. The current threshold of 2 on a 0-8 scale is extremely permissive (only requires 1 of 6 confluence components beyond minimum). The SSS confluence score sums: SS alignment (+2), ISS alignment (+2), CBC confirmation (+1), fifty-tap (+1), target proximity (+1), no F2 conflict (+1). A score of 2 means essentially zero alignment beyond the entry trigger. Raising to 3 requires at least one structural alignment component (e.g., SS direction matching sequence direction), filtering out trades with no contextual support.
expected_improvement: Filters out the bottom tier of low-conviction setups. Given confluence_score's high SHAP importance, trades with score=2 are likely dragging down overall performance. Expected win rate improvement of 2-4 percentage points on retained trades. Also reduces overtrading, which helps with prop firm daily loss limits.
